issues.criterion: Blocks decorate correctly on preview URLs
issues.details:
5 of 8 blocks (accordion, carousel, tabs, topic-menu, clinic-finder) cannot be verified on aem.page preview because all content pages that should use these blocks return empty HTML (
). Pages checked: /nl/qa (expected accordion), /nl/find-a-clinic (expected clinic-finder), /nl/treatment/lips, /nl/treatment/enhance, /nl/treatment/eye-area (expected tabs/carousel/columns). DA content listing confirms these files exist (lastModified timestamps present) but they have not been published/previewed to https://main--jv-test-5--jmffraiz.aem.page. Only 3 blocks verified live: hero, cards, columns (all rendered correctly with zero console errors on main homepage).
issues.remediation: Trigger aem.page preview for all content pages via POST to https://admin.hlx.page/preview/jmffraiz/jv-test-5/main/nl/qa, /nl/find-a-clinic, and /nl/treatment/* paths. Alternatively add test content pages to DA with block tables for each unverified block and preview them.

issues.details: blocks/clinic-finder/clinic-finder.css uses 'main .clinic-finder' as the outermost selector for all rules instead of '.clinic-finder' directly. While still scoped to the block name, the selector starts with the 'main' element tag rather than '.clinic-finder'. Example: 'main .clinic-finder { padding: 0; }'. The criterion requires every selector to start with '.{block-name}'.
issues.remediation: Remove the 'main' prefix from clinic-finder.css selectors. Change 'main .clinic-finder { ... }' to '.clinic-finder { ... }' throughout the file. The block scoping via .clinic-finder is sufficient.

summary: FAIL — All 8 block JS/CSS files exist on main, lint passes, fstab/scripts/styles/head all correct, but 5 blocks (accordion, carousel, tabs, topic-menu, clinic-finder) cannot be verified on live preview URLs because their content pages return empty HTML. Only hero, cards, and columns verified on aem.page.

evidence.npm_lint: npm run lint (eslint + stylelint) → zero errors ✓
evidence.delayed_onetrust: scripts/delayed.js has loadOneTrust() function at line 10, called at line 68 ✓
evidence.head_html: head.html has viewport meta, CSP, aem.js/scripts.js modules, styles.css ✓
evidence.no_framework_imports: All block JS files: no react/vue/jquery/tailwind imports ✓
evidence.es6_modules: All 8 blocks have 'export default function decorate(block)' ✓
evidence.live_blocks_verified: hero/cards/columns render on https://main--jv-test-5--jmffraiz.aem.page/ with 0 console errors ✓
evidence.lang_at_runtime: Playwright confirms html[lang='nl'] on live preview ✓
